response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical experience in distributed systems, cloud infrastructure, and leadership with open-source contributions, but his resume lacks direct experience with C++ (primary requirement), large-scale cloud compute platforms, or DevOps/cloud architecture leadership. His background is heavily skewed toward web/mobile development and D programming, with limited evidence of managing cloud compute platforms or mentoring teams in such contexts.
strengths: Extensive experience with distributed systems and low-latency applications (e.g., Dunnhumby media, GISCollective)
Proven leadership in mentoring and organizing workshops (e.g., Selenium courses, Refactoring Dojos)
Strong open-source contributions and technical evangelism (e.g., GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts)
concerns: No direct C++ experience listed (critical requirement for this role)
Limited evidence of cloud compute platform leadership or DevOps mentorship
Most recent roles focus on web/mobile development rather than infrastructure or compute technologies
